content_body:
Looking for some epic ideas for a fun and adventurous getaway with the guys? Look no further than Blue Ridge, GA. Nestled in the heart of the Blue Ridge Mountains, this awesome town offers a wide range of activities that are perfect for a guy's trip! You can enjoy outdoor activities, craft beers, and much more. Here's a suggested travel itinerary to make the most of your getaway:

Reserving Your Luxury Cabin

Terrace Level Game Room at Aska Escape Lodge

Be sure to save some time to enjoy your luxury Blue Ridge cabin, especially if it’s on the Toccoa River. Enjoy hanging out on the fully furnished decks, grilling steaks and burgers while taking in the awesome views. If you’re on the river, spend some quiet solitude fishing from the property. Later in the evening, head to the terrace level of your cabin and enjoy some friendly competition playing pool, ping pong, or foosball, depending on what your cabin offers.

Motorcyclist's Paradise

Serendipity on Noontootla Creek

For the motorcyclists in the group, Blue Ridge and surrounding North GA Mountains offers some of the best curvy mountain roads popular with many bikers. Aska Road and Hwy, 60 to Dahlonega, are just a couple of popular routes, and Serendipity on Noontootla Creek is the perfect Luxury Blue Ridge cabin for bikers. Right off Aska Road with paved access, enjoy this large five bedroom/5bath luxury lodge with your buddies and have the best time ever. Another perfect cabin is High Hopes as it is all paved with little incline.

Blue Ridge, GA, is the perfect destination for a guy's trip. With its natural beauty, endless activities, and friendly locals, it's sure to be a trip that you and your buddies will never forget. So grab your fishing rods, hiking boots, or golf clubs and head to the mountains for an unforgettable adventure!

First Day:

To maximize your brief weekend in Blue Ridge, add an early check-in at 1:30 p.m. to your reservation so you can unpack the cars before your first adventure! Start your vacation off with an exhilarating whitewater rafting adventure! With class III and IV rapids, this world-renowned destination is sure to get your heart racing and adrenaline pumping. Located just under 30 minutes from Blue Ridge, you will find your thrills on the Ocoee River from these outfitters - Rolling Thunder River Company and Ocoee Rafting. Should you wish to soar over the mountains instead, Ocoee Rafting also offers zip lining as well!

After an adventurous afternoon, head back to your luxury cabin for a flavorful dinner crafted by your own private chef! Blue Duck, headed by Chef Steven, will offer you the most memorable experience to start your Blue Ridge guy's trip. When your group retires for the evening, sink into the comfortable beds at our luxury cabins that will give you the best night's rest you have had in so long.

Second Day:

After your first cup of coffee, begin your day with a personal fly-fishing trip headed by Joe DePietro! Known as the Trout Capital of Georgia, Blue Ridge is known for its top-notch trout fishing on the Toccoa River, Noontootla Creek, Hemptown Creek, Fightingtown Creek, and even Lake Blue Ridge. Whether a beginner or expert fisherman, there are a number of excellent fly-fishing guides who provide all the equipment you’ll need to spend a half-day or full day on the streams and rivers in these beautiful mountains and will guide you to the most populated honey holes to catch some monster trophy rainbow trout. Also in line with the outdoor fun of fishing, Noontootla Creek Farms offers skeet shooting and is only 20 minutes away from downtown Blue Ridge.

After your exciting morning catching some of the finest rainbow trout, head to Amicalola Falls or The Swinging Bridge for some hiking! The third-tallest waterfall on this side of the Mississippi, Amicalola Falls, is well worth the 40-minute drive from Blue Ridge to stand in awe of the cascading 729-foot tall waterfall.

If mountain biking is more your speed, North Georgia offers plenty of trails for a memorable ride! With its scenic trails and varying difficulty levels, it's a great destination for outdoor adventure. If even more adrenaline suits your fancy, rent a slingshot for the day with Blue Ridge Adventure Rentals! Zip through the scenic highways of North Georgis in style while making memories to last a lifetime. 

When your exciting excursions come to a close for the day, rally the guys and visit Ferraro's or Harvest on Main for a filling and delicious meal! An Italian native, Chef Igor recently expanded his restaurant experience to Blue Ridge with a fantastic Italian menu. A staple of Blue Ridge, Harvest on Main offers a farm-to-table menu with surf or turf options.

Third-Day:

For a relaxing final day in Blue Ridge, visit Old Toccoa Farms or Brasstown Valley Resort for a round of golf! Offering beautiful landscapes and challenging courses, enjoy the natural beauty of the Blue Ridge area while showing off or fine-tuning your golf game.

Afterward, head to downtown Blue Ridge to visit a few of the finest North Georgia breweries! Enjoy a cold beer and good company at Grumpy Old Men Brewing, Angry Hops, or Tipping Point Brewing Co. While in the area, visit a few boutique shops specifically crafted with guys in mind, like Vertigo Pinball, Oar Finer Goods, or Mountain Man Comics!

While bringing your unforgettable getaway to a close, enjoy a final dinner at Mystic Mountain Pizza for more retro video games and mouthwatering pizza, two things that all guys adore.

Fourth Day:

Though your time in Blue Ridge has come to a close, cherish the memories, laughs, and deep conversations with your band of brothers during your North Georgia vacation. Your stay with us will generate Guest Loyalty Points for your use when reserving your next guy's trip!
title: Guys Weekend Ideas in Blue Ridge GA
